name: aitattman-blocks
description: Enable wordpress custom blocks like Side-panel, Search Box, Query, Button, Slider
author: Ahmed Ait Attman <aitattman@outlook.com> (https://aitattman.pages.dev)

scripts.zip-plugin: mkdir -p aitattman-blocks && cp -r build languages aitattman-blocks.php README.md LICENSE.txt aitattman-blocks/ && zip -r plugin.zip . -i 'aitattman-blocks/*' -m
scripts.zip-for-wp: mkdir -p aitattman-blocks && cp -r aitattman-blocks.php build readme.txt LICENSE.txt aitattman-blocks/ && zip -r wp-aitattman-blocks.zip . -i 'aitattman-blocks/*' -m
